case_title: HALL, MICHAEL vs. CHIN, HUNGWEI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, HUNGWEI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-05-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-15-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1994, CONTINUED TO FEB-03-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-03-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-03-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-06-1995, OFF CALENDAR
